content.problemStatement:
You are located at the coordinate (0,0)(0, 0)(0,0) on a 222D grid with perpendicular XXX and YYY axes.

You will do the following moves:


first, AAA units along positive XXX axis
then, BBB units along positive YYY axis
then, CCC units along negative XXX axis
finally, DDD units along negative YYY axis
Find the coordinates of your final position.


Input Format

The first and only line of input contains 444 integers - A,B,CA, B, CA,B,C and DDD.


Output Format
For each test case, output on a new line the XXX and YYY coordinates of your final position.

sampleTestCases.explanation:
Explanation:
Initially, you started at (0,0)(0, 0)(0,0)

555 steps along positive XXX, so you reached (5,0)(5, 0)(5,0)
444 steps along positive YYY, so you reached (5,4)(5, 4)(5,4)
777 steps along negative XXX, so you reached (−2,4)(-2, 4)(−2,4)
333 steps along negative YYY, so you reached (−2,1)(-2, 1)(−2,1)

Thus, your final position is (−2,1)(-2, 1)(−2,1).
